title: Rural Energy Enterprises, Inc., RurAL CAP Foundation 2022 Application
summary: Managed by Rural Energy Enterprises, Inc. , the RurAL CAP Foundation funds a limited number of small grants for educational and charitable purposes that support low-income individuals and rural communities. Grants are made in the amount of $500 to $5,000. Eligible applications are considered from 50...

title: Ten new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta March 31
summary: On March 31, YKHC reports ten new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. title: April is Child Abuse Prevention Month
summary: Every April we don our blue in recognition of Child Abuse Prevention Month. Our goal is to raise awareness about the signs of child abuse and steps that can be taken to prevent it in our community. During Child Abuse Prevention Month —and all year long—it is important to focus on ways share positive parent...

title: BSNC Mourns the Passing of Chairman Henry Ivanoff
summary: It is with great sadness that Bering Straits Native Corporation (BSNC) announces the passing of Board Chairman Henry Ivanoff Sr. Chairman Ivanoff passed away after a brief illness on March 30, 2022, with family by his side. Chairman Ivanoff served on the BSNC Board of Directors since 1978, as BSNC’s...

title: Open Enrollment May 23rd-June 10th, 2022
summary: Open enrollment for employee benefits is happening May 23rd-June 10th, 2022. This is your chance to make changes to your benefit elections if you choose to. Watch for more information!

title: US farmers expect to plant more soybeans and less corn acreage
summary: Producers surveyed across the United States intend to plant a record high 91.0 million acres of soybeans in 2022, up 4% from last year, according to the Prospective Plantings report released today by USDA’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS).

title: Saloons, Prostitutes, and Temperance in Alaska Territory
summary: The book Saloons, Prostitutes, and Temperance in Alaska Territory explores what happened in the boomtown of Skagway after the gold rush. The post Saloons, Prostitutes, and Temperance in Alaska Territory appeared first on Alaska Magazine .

title: I’ll Have A Hot Cup Of Coffee With A Side of Songs, Please
summary: More Alaskans doing Alaskan stuff which is remarkably like stuff people do elsewhere, but better, because it's from Alaska.
